ncon2-0.1.0.description:
Hopefully this just works. Generate a room with the .apworld, then open the Naruto: Clash of Ninja 2 client and the game in dolphin. Connect to the archipelago room and everything should function properly... should...

Make sure you've deleted your save data file through Dolphin if you have a pre-existing one, otherwise you will send out your checks automatically.
ncon2-0.1.0.title: Naruto Clash of Ninja 2 Archipelago v0.1.0
